data.title: Sonepar USA speeds up digital transformation by revamping top management
data.description: Sonepar has committed to investing over $1.092 billion (€1 billion) in digital transformation over the next five years, with the aim of creating a more digitally driven, omnichannel user experience.

data.title: Edible Brands president becomes new CEO
data.description: Somia Farid Silber takes over as CEO of the company, formerly called Edible Arrangements, from her father, the company's founder.

data.title: Advanced Energy enhances digital commerce platform through transformation
data.description: The first phase of Advanced Energy’s digital transformation involved consolidating multiple websites and brands into a unified online presence under the "One AE" brand.

data.title: Amazon sellers grow sales 41% on Day 1 of Prime Big Deal Days
data.description: Momentum Commerce, a consulting company that manages Amazon sales for brands that account for more than $7 billion in annual sales on the marketplace, said its clients brought in 41% more year over year during Day 1 of Prime Big Deal Days 2024.

data.title: With $25 million in new funding, Logik.io ups its CPQ strategy
data.description: Logik.io’s founders pioneered configure-price-quote technology two decades ago. Now they plan to bring CPQ technology to a new level.
